steps.cardTextBefore:
Wave 4 integration proof

Updates every few minutes until Jul 8, 2026, 1:49 AM.

"Create a concise live pulse wall for the facilitation project. Focus on what participants are worried about, what themes are emerging, and what the host should notice next. Use only dembrane canvas kit classes, be honest..."

steps.previewTextSample:
FACILATION 1
Live Pulse Wall

Waiting for active conversation streams to begin

Current Worries & Friction
Awaiting Input
No active worries recorded yet

As participants begin speaking in the sessions, their concerns, anxieties, and points of friction will appear here in real time to help you guide the room.

Emerging Themes
Themes will appear as people speak

Eight conversations are connected to this project, but we have not received recent transcript data in the current window. Once the dialogue starts, the assistant will surface key patterns here.

HOST NOTICE
Ready for facilitation

Keep this screen open. It will automatically refresh and populate with live participant voices, core tensions, and actionable insights as soon as the discussions get underway.

FACILATION 1
Live Pulse Wall
Monitoring 8 conversations • Updated just now
Waiting for live discussion data
Eight conversations are connected to this project, but no active speaking or transcript text has arrived within the tracking window yet.
As soon as participants begin speaking, their worries, emerging themes, and key alerts for the host will appear here in real time.
URGENT CONCERNS
Participant Worries
No worries or tensions detected yet. This section will highlight what participants are struggling with or anxious about as they speak.
HOST NOTICEBOARD
Emerging Themes
Themes and patterns will form here automatically once the conversations yield enough shared concepts and ideas.
